did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article discussing the potential and applications of AI, machine learning, and deep learning (specifically CNNs) in melanoma detection. It does not present original experimental results, nor does it report on a specific study where AI was used to obtain new clinical or diagnostic results; it only reviews existing literature.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
